mapper.insert: insert into orders ( order_no, user_id, companion_id, patient_id, service_id, service_name, service_image, hospital, department, appointment_time, pickup_option, pickup_address, remarks, amount, actual_amount, status ) values ( #{orders.orderNo}, #{orders.userId}, #{orders.companionId}, #{orders.patientId}, #{orders.serviceId}, #{orders.serviceName}, #{orders.serviceImage}, #{orders.hospital}, #{orders.department}, #{orders.appointmentTime}, #{orders.pickupOption}, #{orders.pickupAddress}, #{orders.remarks}, #{orders.amount}, #{orders.actualAmount}, #{orders.status} )
mapper.select: select o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.companion_id, cp.name as companion_name, u.phone as companion_phone, cp.avatar as companion_avatar, o.service_id, o.service_name, o.service_image, o.patient_id, p.name as patient_name, o.hospital, o.department, o.appointment_time, o.pickup_option, o.pickup_address, o.remarks, o.amount, o.actual_amount, o.pay_method, o.pay_time, o.status, o.refund_reason, o.refund_time, o.complete_time, o.create_time, o.update_time, CASE WHEN orv.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END as reviewed, orv.score as reviewScore, orv.content as reviewContent from orders o left join companion_profile cp on o.companion_id = cp.id left join sys_user u on cp.user_id = u.id left join patient p on o.patient_id = p.id left join order_review orv on o.id = orv.order_id where o.id = #{id} and o.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update:
update orders
status = #{status},
complete_time = now(),
cancel_time = now(),
refund_time = now(),
refund_time = now(),
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
update orders set pay_method = #{payMethod}, pay_time = now(), status = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update orders set refund_reason = #{refundReason}, refund_time = now(), status = 5, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update orders set companion_id = #{companionId}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update orders set complete_time = now(), status = 3, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update companion_profile cp set cp.score = ( select COALESCE(AVG(orv.score), 5.0) from order_review orv where orv.companion_id = cp.id ), cp.comments = ( select COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) from order_review orv where orv.companion_id = cp.id ), cp.update_time = now() where cp.id = #{companionId}
mapper.select: select count(*) from order_review where order_id = #{orderId}
